title: Harrison's Model of E-Waste Management
description: A flowchart depicting Harrison R.M's systematic approach to managing electronic waste, emphasizing environmental protection.
relationships: Consumer Use leads to End-of-Life Decision
End-of-Life Decision can lead to Reuse/Refurbishment or Collection
Sorting separates reusable components from recyclable materials and waste
Recyclable materials go to Material Recovery
Non-recyclable waste goes to Residual Disposal
Public Awareness influences Consumer Use and End-of-Life Decision
